name: Instagram
description: Access Instagram Graph API to manage media, insights, and user profiles.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## Instagram Graph API

Access Instagram user profiles, media, and insights through the Instagram Graph API.

**Note:** Get your access token at [Meta for Developers](https://developers.facebook.com/apps/).

Authorization.description: Instagram access token for authentication (Environment variable: INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get User Profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Instagram profile information.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. id,username,name,biography,followers_count,media_count)

tools.name: Get User Media
tools.description: Get a collection of image, video, and album objects for the authenticated user.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. id,caption,media_type,media_url,timestamp)

limit.description: Maximum number of media objects to return (default 12, max 100)

after.description: Cursor for pagination - fetch results after this cursor

before.description: Cursor for pagination - fetch results before this cursor

tools.name: Get Media Details
tools.description: Get details about a specific media object.

media_id.description: The ID of the media object

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. id,caption,media_type,media_url,like_count,comments_count)

tools.name: Get Media Insights
tools.description: Get insights (metrics) for a specific media object.

media_id.description: The ID of the media object

metric.description: Comma-separated list of metrics to retrieve (e.g. impressions,reach,likes,comments,shares,saved)

tools.name: Get User Insights
tools.description: Get insights (metrics) for an Instagram Business or Creator account.

user_id.description: The ID of the Instagram user account

period.description: Period for the metric: day, week, days_28, month, lifetime

since.description: Unix timestamp for start of date range

until.description: Unix timestamp for end of date range

tools.name: Refresh Access Token
tools.description: Refresh a long-lived Instagram access token before it expires.

access_token.description: The long-lived access token to refresh

tools.name: Get User Tags
tools.description: Get a collection of image and video objects in which a user has been tagged by another user.

user_id.description: The ID of the Instagram user

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: Get Media Children
tools.description: Get a collection of image and video objects on an album (carousel) media object.

media_id.description: The ID of the album (carousel) media object

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. id,media_type,media_url)
